Subject:
MV APJ PRITI 2 OPENING IN YANGJIANG,CHINA THE LAYCAN 27 NOVEMBER  2025 – 28 NOVEMBER   2025
FROM: ARYACORP PVT. LTD.
DATE & TIME: 26-11-2025 11:44:24   (GMT +5:30)
REFERΕNCE NO:
20620784
ATTN CHARTERING DESK
DEAR SIR
GOOD DAY
DIRECT OWNERS VESSEL
PLEASE ADVISE SUITABLE CARGO FOR BELOW VESSEL
/// DO NOT RE-CIRCULATE ///
MV APJ PRITI 2 OPENING IN YANGJIANG,CHINA THE LAYCAN 27 NOVEMBER  2025 – 28 NOVEMBER   2025
BOD : HFO  ABT 1800 – ABT  1850 MT AND LSMGO ABT 175  – ABT 225  MT
MV APJ PRITI 2
BUILT 2006, SHIPYARD ; TSUNEISHI SHIPBUILDING CO, LTD. JAPAN
PROPOSED INDIAN-FLAG, CLASS- BV & IRS
HO/HA 7/7, DWT 82574 MT AT 14.429 MTRS,TPC 70.209 (S),
LOA/BEAM 228.99 M/32.26 M,GT/NT 43168  / 27291
GRAIN  97186.10 CBM,
GEARLESS, OPEN LOOP SCRUBBER FITTED
ALL DETAILS ABOUT
ALL SPEED AND CONSUMPTION FIGURES ARE AVERAGE FIGURES DURING C/P PERIOD. ALL SPEED AND ALL CONSUMPTION FIGURES ARE TO BE CONSIDERED AS \'ABOUT\'.
THE VESSEL IS FITTED WITH AN OPEN LOOP EXHAUST GAS CLEANING SYSTEM (EGCS), WITH WASH WATER DISCHARGE OVERBOARD ONLY AS WELL AS A BALLAST WATER TREATMENT SYSTEM (BWTS), BOTH OF WHICH CHARTERERS ARE ALLOWED TO USE STRICTLY AS PER THE CHARTER PARTY TERMS & PROVISIONS, WHERE ONLY ALLOWED AND WHERE CAN ONLY SAFELY BE OPERATED. VESSELS EGC & BWT SYSTEMS CANNOT BE USED IN RIVERS, CANALS, INLAND AND/OR MUDDY AND/OR RESTRICTED AND/OR LOW ALKALINITY LEVELS WATERS AS WELL IN PORT HEDLAND.
SPEED ABT  12.50  KNOTS PER DAY @ ABT HFO  24.50  MT + ABT LSMGO 0.20  MT FOR  BALLAST
SPEED ABT  11.50  KNOTS PER DAY @ ABT HFO 24.00  MT + ABT LSMGO  0.20   MT FOR   LADEN
ECO SPEED ABT  11.50   KNOTS PER DAY @ ABT HFO 23.50  MT + ABT LSMGO  0.20  MT FOR  BALLAST
ECO SPEED ABT  11.00  KNOTS PER DAY @ ABT HFO  23.00  MT + ABT LSMGO 0.20  MT FOR  LADEN
VESSEL NOT TO BE ORDERED TO EXCEED THE DESCRIBED SPEEDS (NOT EVEN IF WOG) DURING AND THROUGHOUT THIS C/P.
AFORESAID SPEEDS AND CONSUMPTIONS ARE FROM BEGINNING TO END OF SEA PASSAGE, AT OPEN SEA, DURING GOOD WEATHER DAYS NAMELY, DAYS UP TO AND INCLUDING BEAUFORT SCALE 4 (11-16 KNOTS ) OF MINIMUM 24 CONSECUTIVE HOURS RUNNING FROM NOON TO NOON POSITION LT AND TOTAL COMBINED (SEA AND SWELL) SIGNIFICANT WAVE HEIGHT CONFINED TO LIMITS MAX 1.25 METERS WITH NO ADVERSE CURRENTS AND NO CURRENT FACTOR, FAVORABLE CURRENT ARE NOT TO BE TAKEN INTO ACCOUNT, WITH A MAXIMUM SEA WATER TEMPERATURE OF 28 DEG C, EXTRAPOLATION FROM GOOD WEATHER TO ALL WEATHER IS NOT ALLOWED, NOT EXCEEDING SUMMER DRAFT AND EVEN KEEL, EXCLUDING: ANY VOYAGE UNDER 36 HOURS DURATION, PERIODS DURING REDUCTIONS OF SPEED FOR SAFETY, SAILING IN PIRACY AREAS, IN CONGESTION, IN REDUCED VISIBILITY, MANEUVERING OR SAILING IN SHALLOW/RESTRICTED WATERS, AND WHEN APPROACHING/ENTERING/LEAVING PORTS, RIVERS, CANALS, ETC. PERIODS OF 36 HOURS UPON START OF SEA PASSAGE AS WELL AS 36 HOURS PRIOR THE END OF SEA PASSAGE ARE TO BE EXCLUDED FROM THE PERFORMANCE ASSESSMENT.
OWNERS AGREE TO ALLOW REDUCED STEAMING OF THE VESSEL, IF SO INSTRUCTED BY THE CHARTERERS, SUBJECT TO SAFE NAVIGATION. HOWEVER DURING REDUCED STEAMING PERIODS THE VESSEL WILL RUN AT FULL NORMAL RPM FOR ABOUT 2 HOURS PER DAY IN ORDER TO AVOID EXCESSIVE CARBON ACCUMULATION AND MAINTAIN THE NORMAL OPERATION OF THE ENGINE.
IN CASE OF COLD CLIMATE AND/OR REDUCED SPEED ADDITIONAL BOILER CONSUMPTION OF LSMGO 1 METRIC TON PER DAY SHOULD BE EXPECTED.
ANY LOSS OF TIME IS TO BE SET OFF AGAINST ANY SAVING IN CONSUMPTION AND ANY EXCESS CONSUMPTION IS TO BE SET OFF AGAINST ANY SAVING IN TIME.  ANY EXCESS LSMGO CONSUMPTION IS TO BE SET OFF AGAINST SAVING IN HSFO CONSUMPTION AND VICE VERSA, AND ANY LOSS ON INDIVIDUAL PASSAGE(S) IS TO BE SET OFF AGAINST AN OVERALL GAIN ON OTHER INDIVIDUAL PASSAGE(S).
COST AND TIME (INCLUDING ANY DEVIATION TIME REQUIRED) TO MEET (S)ECA REQUIREMENTS AND/OR NATIONAL REGULATIONS IN OPERATION IN PORTS TO WHICH VESSEL IS BOUND, INCLUDING BALLAST EXCHANGE, TO BE FOR CHARTERERS\' ACCOUNT.
UNDER NO CIRCUMSTANCES WILL ANY CLAIM BE DEDUCTED FROM HIRE UNLESS AND UNTIL IT HAS BEEN AGREED BY BOTH PARTIES.
PORT CONSUMPTION PER DAY ( WHEN SCRUBBER USED )
IDLE : HFO– ABT 2.70   MT ( GENERATOR)  + ABT LSMGO  1.00 MT  FOR BOILER
WORKING : HFO - ABT 4.00 MT ( GENERATORS) + ABT LSMGO 1.00  MT, FOR BOILER
(BALLAST OPERATION/MOORING OPERATION, EXCLUDING BWTS )
PORT CONSUMPTION PER DAY ( WHEN SCRUBBER  NOT USED CAN NOT BE USED: AS ABOVE EXCEPT ALL CONSUMPTION ON LSMGO AND EXCLUDING AIR-CONDITION )
IDLE : LSMGO– ABT 2.70  MT ( GENERATOR)  + ABT LSMGO 1.00 MT  FOR BOILER
WORKING : LSMGO - ABT 3.50 MT ( GENERATORS) + ABT LSMGO  1.00  MT, FOR BOILER
(BALLAST OPERATION/MOORING OPERATION, EXCLUDING BWTS.)
FOR HOLDS’ CLEANING ADDITIONAL:  ABOUT 2.2 METRIC TONS/PER DAY HSFO
THE TERM "ABOUT" IS UNDERSTOOD TO MEAN 5% DOWNWARDS IN THE SPEED AND 5% UPWARDS IN THE CONSUMPTION.
ANY PERFORMANCE EVALUATION REPORT SUBMITTED TO OWNERS MUST REFLECT ALL RELATED TERMS AGREED IN VESSEL\'S DESCRIPTION INCLUDING THE SET OFFS AND ALLOWING FOR BOTH ABOUT.
VESSEL BURNS LSMGO IN HER ENGINES IN CASE OF EMERGENCY, WHEN MANEUVERING OR SAILING IN SHALLOW/RESTRICTED WATERS, ROUGH SEA OR SWELL CONDITIONS AND WHEN APPROACHING / ENTERING /LEAVING PORTS, RIVERS, CANALS, ETC.
FOR SAFETY REASONS, CHARTERERS TO PROVIDE AND KEEP ON BOARD DURING SEA PASSAGES SUFFICIENT USABLE QUANTITY WITH SAFETY MARGIN OF HSFO 25 PCT IN ADDITION OF THE ANTICIPATED CONSUMPTION AND OF LSMGO FOR OPERATING THE AUXILIARIES/ GENERATORS NOT LESS THAN THE LSMGO QUANTITY DEPENDING ON THE DURATION OF THE VOYAGE AND MASTERS SATISFACTION.
UNLESS AGREED OTHERWISE, THE VESSEL SHALL BE REDELIVERED WITH THE SAME TYPES AND ABOUT THE SAME QUANTITIES OF FUELS AS ON DELIVERY; HOWEVER, THE TYPES AND QUANTITIES OF FUELS ON REDELIVERY SHALL ALWAYS BE APPROPRIATE AND SUFFICIENT TO ALLOW THE VESSEL TO REACH SAFELY THE NEAREST MAIN BUNKERING PORT AT WHICH FUELS OF THE REQUIRED TYPES ARE AVAILABLE.
THE PARTIES UNDERSTAND AND AGREE THAT WHEN NAVIGATING ANY ECA (EMMISION CONTROL AREA), THE VESSEL IS OBLIGED TO CONSUME LSMGO IN LIEU OF HFO AND AS SUCH, THE VESSELS PERFORMANCE SHALL BE AFFECTED. AS A RESULT, NONE OF THE PERFORMANCE WARRANTIES IN THIS C/P RELATING TO THE VESSELS SPEED AND/OR CONSUMPTION SHALL BE APPLICABLE TO PERIODS IN WHICH THE VESSEL IS NAVIGATING ANY ECA; AND ANY PERIOD NAVIGATING ANY ECA SHALL BE EXCLUDED FROM ANY SPEED OR PERFORMANCE CALCULATION.
PLSD TO HEAR.
BEST REGARDS,
VIKRANT SINGH|Direct: +911244694875 Mobile: | +91 9311255653 | SKYPE ID: acpl.vikrants@outlook.com
